title: FOSTER CARE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY LIVING CASE MANAGEMENT DOUGLAS COUNTY OFFICE FOSTER CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Foster care homes for people with developmental disabilities. Homes provide residential placement, 24-hour supervision, and assistance with daily living activities. Agency also recruits foster care providers for people with disabilities. 2550 NW Edenbower Boulevard Suite 104 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Adults with developmental disabilities; call for eligibility requirements to become a foster care provider Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 315-4300 205 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 315-4300 ext 205 Savannah Hall [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Foster Parent/Family Recruitment * Developmental Issues Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY LIVING CASE MANAGEMENT DOUGLAS COUNTY OFFICE
